nasb.text: “The holy garments of Aaron shall be for his sons after him, that in them they may be anointed and ordained.

esv.text: “The holy garments of Aaron shall be for his sons after him; they shall be anointed in them and ordained in them.

cnv.text: “亞倫的聖衣要傳給他的子孫，要穿著受膏，也要穿著受聖職。

ccb.text: “亚伦的圣衣要留给他的子孙，他们可以穿上这圣衣受膏，承受圣职。
